column90: When searching public databases, we always struggle with missing or heterogeneous metadata. While the issue persists, MIxS is improving the situation!
column91:
Cut down on mandatory fields. While I generally agree on your choices, I suspect it leads to some issues in practice.

Example: from what I understand, the lat_lon field is mandatory. From my experience, it is often not possible/allowed to provide this information (mainly because of privacy concerns). This seems to be a common issue, as I have seen many obviously falsified location data when doing large scale queries (e.g. sequencing facility coordinates given as location for hundreds of datasets).

Maybe the field should be optional.
